title: Reusable Client Architecture, Transport Abstractions, Middleware, and Configuration · Go Client Syste… · Language Lens: Middleware Ordering
summary: A reusable Go SDK needs one configured Client, narrow RoundTripper seams, ordered middleware, typed operations, and rotating configuration. Planned artifact: Add and verify the http go middleware ordering increment in a Go 1.26 net/http small composable client library boundary. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Compose authentication, retries, metrics, tracing, caching, and redaction with documented ordering and ownership. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.

Inject the narrow request execution capability needed for deterministic tests without cloning the whole HTTP library. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
